case_title: JOHNETTA G RICHARDS VS. DERRICK SPIVA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHARDS, JOHNETTA G AS TO DEFENDANT SPIVA, DERRICK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-28-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPIVA, DERRICK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDS, JOHNETTA G IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SPIVA, DERRICK $0 PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HER BURDEN OF PROVING THAT DEFENDANT RETAINED FUNDS THAT WERE INTENDED TO REIMBURSE HER FOR HER TRAVEL COSTS. DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY THAT FUNDS RAISED FOR THE SOUTH AFRICA TRIP WERE FULLY AUDITED IS UNREBUTTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $874.72 FILED BY RICHARDS, JOHNETTA G AS TO DEFENDANT SPIVA, DERRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN PLAINTIFF JOHNETTA G. RICHARDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DERRICK SPIVA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
